title: Clay Figure
description: Allows you to summon villagers and blazes by crafting figures and placing them.
body:
This mod allows you to summon villagers by sculpting clay figures, firing them, and then placing the fired figures.

As of version 2, you are also able to craft golden blaze statues to summon blazes.

The unfired figures are crafted using clay, and firing the figures takes about one minute in a blast furnace. Important note, the firing only works in a blast furnace.

Upon right click on a block with at least two non-solid blocks above it, the figure will be placed and spawn the mob.

This mod was made with the intention of making gaining access to villager trades more simple, removing the need for transporting villagers from a village to your base.

> You can see an example of its use in the **[Cognata](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cognata)** modpack!
